items.name: Lil Shark Buddy (Shoulder Pet / Shark Plushie)
items.description:
🦈 Take your new Lil Shark Buddy anywhere you go! This cute shark plushie shoulder sits on your shoulder and adds ocean vibes to any avatar. Perfect for shark lovers, DEEP fans, and anyone who loves the sea. Matches perfectly with the SharkBite Hood!
